title: Listening’s Practice

description: Listen to the audio and complete the missing words correctly.

title: Grammar’s Practice
subtitle: Grammar Fix
description: Choose the correct grammar to fix the sentence.

title: Vocabulary’s Quiz

description: Match each word with its correct meaning to improve your vocabulary skills.

title: Speaking’s Practice

description: Read the passage carefully and answer the questions.

title: Writing’s Practice

description: Use the given words to write a short and meaningful sentence.

title: Conversation’s Practice
subtitle: Daily Conversation
description: Choose the best reply to continue the conversation.
